HeiL PR37 Large Diameter Hand-Held Vocal Microphone with Pop Filter & XLR Cable Bundle
['The', 'PR 37 professional microphone bundle', 'is designed with the vocalist in mind, the PR 37 produces natural, articulate sound over a wide frequency range. Its excellent upper mid-range response has been designed to cut through a mix whether live or in the studio. It features a 1.5″ diameter dynamic element that is mounted in a rugged housing to reduce handling noise. The PR 37 has a frequency response from 40 to 18,000 Hz and an output level of -48.9 dB @ 1000 Hz. The PR 37 joins an already impressive lineup of vocal microphones from Heil Sound, extending the evolution of the PR 35 while adding in design elements of the PR 22. The company worked with several FOH mix engineers, both with the initial design and subsequent field testing of the new microphone. John Hopkins, FOH for the bands Sleep, Uncle Acid and the Deadbeats, stated, “The PR 37 immediately moved to the top of the list for my go-to vocal mic. It’s a super transparent mic and the rejection of stage noise is incredible.” Adam Pike, working with the PR 37 and Red Fang had a similar response, “The Heil PR 37 is a beast! Very rich and smooth low-mids along with the pristine high-mids that Heil is known for. The extremely sturdy casing is also a great added bonus.” It comes with a Pop filter and XLR-XLR cable.', 'Box Contains', 'Heil PR37 Large Diameter Hand-Held Vocal Microphone', 'Pop Filter', 'Pop Filter', 'XLR-XLR Cable', 'XLR-XLR Cable', '1-Year Warranty', '1-Year Warranty']

['GREAT FOR  !', 'Joe Birl Bones feature a patented groove that makes them easy to grip and prevents them from slipping. So if you ever wanted to try "rattlin\' the bones," then this is an excellent choice to get yourself started.', ' . JOE BIRL RHYTHM BONES', 'Designed by the late legendary Joe Birl. Joe was\xa0famous among bones players for these easy-to-grip minstrel-style bones with a handy finger notch.', ' GRIP', "Joe Birl loved rattlin' the bones. But he didn't like how rattling the bones made his fingers hurt. That's why he came up for the idea of a finger notch. The notch makes the bones more comfortable to hold (and also keeps the bones from slipping out of your hand).", '  KEEP YOUR  IN PLACE', 'Three claims were awarded by the U.S. Patent Office in 1948 (patent no. ). As one customer puts it, "The Birl notch is like training wheels for the bones." Cardinal Classics, 200 Poker Chips Set Playing Cards Deck Dealer Button Texas Hold ‘Em Classic Casino Table Game, for Adults and Kids Ages 10 and Up
['When people play the classic game of poker today, they’re most likely playing Texas Hold ‘Em, the poker game played in tournaments and on TV. Our 200-Piece Poker Set has everything you need to set up and play the game in home or on the road. Divvy up the 200 two-toned poker chips evenly between players, shuffle the classic Poker card deck, deal the cards, and let the betting begin! If you’re new to Texas Hold ‘Em, we include complete, easy-to-follow rules of the game. This set includes everything you need to play- a single deck of standard playing cards, a dealer button, and 200 poker chips in traditional white, blue, red, and green. The most popular poker game in America today, Texas Hold ‘Em is played in tournaments and homes across the country. Our instructions clearly explain how to play. No matter your poker skill level or experience, this set will have you ready for a classic poker game night with friends or family. Just imagine you are in Vegas! Our 200-Piece Poker Set is for 2 or more players, ages 10 and up, from beginners to professionals.']
[' POKER CHIPS AND CARDS: This set includes everything you need to play- a single deck of standard playing cards, a dealer button, and 200 poker chips in traditional white, blue, red, and green.', ' RULES FOR TEXAS HOLD ‘EM: The most popular poker game in America today, Texas Hold ‘Em is played in tournaments and homes across the country. Our instructions clearly explain how to play.', 'FOR  OR : No matter your poker skill level or experience, this set will have you ready for a classic poker game night with friends or family. Just imagine you are in Vegas!', 'SPIN MASTER , TOYS & GAMES: A world of jigsaw puzzles and family board games for kids, teens, and adults. Plus strategy, cards, and classic board games like dominoes, mahjong, or a chess set.', ' FOR : When you are with friends, bring a Spin Master game, toy, or cards. For family game nights, birthdays, parties, travel, holiday gifts, and whenever you just want to have fun.', 'Includes 200 Poker Chips, 1 Dealer Button, 1 Deck of Poker Cards, Instructions', 'Covered by the Spin Master Care Commitment. See below for full details']

['Product Description', 'PlanToys designers have created an innovative sorting and stacking toy with the Wooden Lacing Sheep. The head of the sheep has a spine of 5 multi - colored "vertebrae." D-TAR Wave-Length Pickup System
['The D-TAR Wave-Length combines a thin, piezo under-saddle transducer with an 18v, low-noise, high input impedance preamp, to create a pickup system with twice the dynamic range of typical 9v systems. The 18v preamp is powered by two AA batteries. With 18 volts, your signal has more headroom, so hard strumming won\'t distort as easily. The Wave-Length preamp also has an input for a second source, like a magnetic pickup or a soundboard transducer.Two adjustable trim pots, one low frequency shelving and one high frequency shelving, allow you to fine tune and set and forget the bass and treble frequencies to optimize the Wave-Length pickup and preamp for your instrument\'s size and shape; enabling you to transparently amplify the natural timbre of your acoustic guitar with minimal coloration. D-TAR includes a 1/4 " jack (jack 6,35) and detailed installation instructions with the Wave-Length undersaddle pickup and preamp.D-TAR - Duncan/Turner Acoustic ResearchSeymour Duncan and Rick Turner are two legends who spent years working with musicians, perfecting their tone. Seymour founded his self-named company in 1978 which has become well-known for its wide variety of guitar and bass pickups used by just about every name player from Billie Joe Armstrong to Angus Young. Rick co-founded Alembic, was president of Gibson Labs West Coast R&D Division, co-founded Highlander Musical Audio making piezo acoustic guitar pickups for Lindsay Buckingham, Ry Cooder, David Lindley, and Andy Summers, and runs his own Renaissance Guitars. Now Seymour and Rick are working together to create innovative products for acoustic musicians. Their D-TAR motto: "With respect to acoustic tone."']
['Unitary full length pickup accommodates virtually all 6-string spacings Thin cable design easy installs in guitars with either 1/8" or 3/32" saddles, often with no modification to the saddle slot.High Headroom allows for twice the dynamic range of a 9-volt system. Uses two "AA" batteries Dual Source Capability allows the user to combine the wave-length with a magnetic pickup or soundboard transducer for greater complexity of signalAdjustable bass and treble trim controls']

Van Helsing
['Product Description', "A team of vampire hunters, with its leader Doctor Van Helsing, prepare for a fierce fight with Count Dracula. Explore Dracula's castle to find the equipment necessary to properly outfit the team. Watch each other's backs and beware Dracula, he is able to disappear and appear suddenly. Should he catch you unawares, he can turn you into a vampire and have you join his side. Van Helsing is the latest release from Frederic Moyersoen, designer of Nuns on the Run and Bacchus' Banquet. In Van Helsing one player plays Dracula, moving through his castle searching for his brides. The other players play Van Helsing and his associates. They move through the castle trying to avoid being bitten and searching for weapons and equipment that will help them defeat Dracula. Players bitten by Dracula become his minions and try to help him catch the other players (so no players are ever out of the game). ['The', 'Auray WSF-2018 Foam Windscreen for Shotgun Microphones', 'is made from specialty acoustic foam designed to reduce broadband wind noise with minimal high frequency loss. The density of the foam is optimized to help protect the microphone element from wind pressure without dramatically muffling the sound.', 'This windscreen is most effective in calm to light breeze conditions (0-7mph), and can be used indoors for protection against drafts caused by air-conditioners. It also reduces vocal plosives in close microphone placement situations. Users can generally expect a 4dB to 8dB reduction in wind noise, with very slight dampening of high frequencies. For most applications, the very slight high frequency dampening is a worthwhile exchange for the notable wind noise reduction.', "The WSF-2018's foam is hypoallergenic and washable and helps prevent moisture and dirt from damaging your microphone. Harley-Davidson Live to Ride Collector's Edition Monopoly Board Game
['Product description', "The ultimate board game and a must have collectible for the Harley-Davidson enthusiast, this game incorporates buying, selling and trading the all-time greatest motorcycles in a quest to own the most legendary bikes in Harley-Davidson history. Hit the highway with Mr.  and outmaneuver your opponents so that you can own the ultimate Harley-Davidson collection. Live to Ride...and Ride to Live. Nothing can compare with the freedom of riding a Harley down America's scenic highways, byways and spectacular backroads. Now you can experience that same sensation without even riding the motorcycle. Play the all-new Harley-Davidson edition of the Monopoly Game. America's favorite board game is a motorcycle-lover's dream come true! Buy renowned Harley bikes, purchase rare Harley collector items and pick up exotic custom gas tanks. Build garages and run dealerships as you create a Harley-Davidson empire! Game includes: game board, property cards, custom Harley-Davidson money and banker's tray, custom Adventure and Freedom cards, 2 custom dice, package of 32 garages, package of 12 dealerships, and 8 custom pewter game tokens.", 'Amazon.com', 'Advance your Evolution engine token to Custom Paint Shop; do not pass "GO"; do not collect $200. And so it is with the game of Monopoly: Harley-Davidson Live To Ride Edition, the classic real estate trading game in a customized version that successfully melds Parker Brothers with Pascal Picotte. Game play is the same as the traditional version--buying, selling, and collecting rents on properties and enhancing their value by erecting various structures--but this game board features Harley collectibles and the structures are garages and dealerships (the Live To Ride version of houses and hotels). Income Tax becomes a Toll Road, and Boardwalk and Park Place give way to the 2000 Softail Deuce and the 1903 serial No. 1 bike models. Hook and loop fastener strips secure down the front, letting your kid easily dress themselves. To top it all off, the mask is sure to send shivers down the spine of any fellow revelers! Haddonfield beware! All in the Family Myers doesn't get along great with his family but you can make him feel right at home. Make sure your young villain doesn't have to terrorize alone! Give your kiddo a chosen family! You'll find fellow classic masked slasher stars from Ghostface to Leatherface. Coming in a range of styles and sizes for all ages, everyone from mom and dad to baby can take part in spreading the fear! Whether you're taking a Halloween family portrait or heading to a party, this group costume is sure to be a hoot. ['Product Description', "Barbie is a gorgeous southern belle as Scarlett O'Hara in Gone with the Wind. The neckline and the wide ribbon tied around her waist are of dark green velvet that accentuates the vibrant color of Scarlett's eyes. Atop her soft brown hair sits a wide-brimmed straw hat with two more long, dark green ribbons. Her accessories include a lace handkerchief, gold drop earrings, and a gold necklace with coral flowers. Focusrite Midnight ISA 110 and ISA 130 Plug-in Suite
['Focusrite’s new Midnight plug-in suite takes two of the most iconic Focusrite modules of all time–the ISA110 equalizer and ISA130 compressor; models their sound exactly with powerful DSP technology; and gives them elegant, functional on-screen front panels that make them simplicity itself to use. Now you can add that authentic, classic Focusrite sound to your own tracks at a price you can afford. Your productions have never sounded so good. The ISA110 and 130 modules, created for the legendary Forté console in the 1980s, represent the epitome of Focusrite analog audio processing, and performed a vital role in the making of literally thousands of hit records–they still change hands for thousands today. Their new digital incarnation in the Midnight suite for AU, VST and RTAS gives them stunning new hi-def on-screen front panels so realistic you’ll believe you can grab a knob with your fingers. In fact, of course, you can tweak them with a click and a drag of the mouse, or graphically edit the response curves. But whichever way you want to go, behind each exquisite graphic front-panel lies powerful DSP code that exactly models the original analogue processors that inspired the Midnight suite, with all the warmth, clarity, control and incredible sound of those original analogue designs. A glance at those clear, clean analog-style front panels and you’ll know exactly how to use the Midnight suite. The controls are simple and intuitive. The meters are responsive and accurate. And the sound… these plug-ins sound as good as they look, putting classic Focusrite clarity and warmth under your fingertips.']

['This is a 3-pack of chrome-plated ovoid-shaped jack plates. These plates have a curved profile meant to fit the side of a standard acoustic guitar, but they can be easily flattened between two pieces of wood in a vice or carefully with a hammer. These plates include two mounting screws, as shown in the photos. Please note that the premium Neutrik jacks we sell require a 3/8" hole, and will not fit into this jack plate without drilling out the hole. ['Grow 75,000 of the One and Only Orbeez with the Rainbow Seed Bag! Orbeez are the original soft and squishy, fun and wacky colorful water beads you can’t get enough of! Featuring an easy-pour spout on the bag, you can control how many seeds you use at a time, then twist the cap closed until you need more. To hydrate your Orbeez, simply add some of the Orbeez Seeds to a bowl of water and watch them magically grow right before your eyes! In four hours, your vibrant seeds will become juicy grown Orbeez. Squishy and smooth, kids and adults alike will love the soothing sensory experience of Orbeez! There’s no limit to the ways you can play. Roll them, squish them, squeeze them, bounce them, crush them or let them flow through your hands! Fill an inflatable pool with Orbeez, make a stress ball, use them in educational play, create arts and crafts projects and so much more. Use your imagination and have endless amounts of fun with Orbeez! Plus, you can even dry out your grown Orbeez back into their seed form, add more water and grow them all over again! For even more ways to play, use your new Orbeez in the Soothing Spa (sold separately), grow additional Color Seed Packs (each sold separately) or look for the Grown Orbeez Tubes (colors each sold separately).
